profiles.hint: Each entry becomes one `/redirect bind <profile_key>` target. Use the terminal template for local shells and the A2A template for remote agent-card endpoints.

default.label: Bash
default.description: Route the current session to a local Bash terminal.

default.label: Fish
default.description: Route the current session to a local Fish terminal.

default.label: Zsh
default.description: Route the current session to a local Zsh terminal.

default.label: sh
default.description: Route the current session to a local POSIX shell.

default.label: ash
default.description: Route the current session to a local ash shell.

default.label: Claude Code
default.description: Route the current session to a Claude Code A2A bridge.

default.label: Codex
default.description: Route the current session to a Codex CLI A2A bridge.

default.label: Qwen Code
default.description: Route the current session to a Qwen Code A2A bridge.

default.label: Gemini CLI
default.description: Route the current session to a Gemini CLI A2A bridge.

default.label: iFlow
default.description: Route the current session to an iFlow CLI A2A bridge.

default.label: Copilot CLI
default.description: Route the current session to a Copilot CLI A2A bridge.

terminal.name: Local terminal profile
terminal.hint: Use a local shell executable and bind it to a stable profile key.

a2a.name: A2A profile
a2a.hint: Configure a remote agent-card endpoint that AstrBot can bind to.

agent_card_url.hint: Supports a full `/.well-known/agent-card.json` URL or a base URL.

headers.hint: Optional request headers sent during discovery and JSON-RPC calls.

blocking.description: Wait for the remote task to finish

require_admin.description: Only allow AstrBot administrators to use redirect targets

terminal_working_directory.description: Default working directory for new local terminal sessions

terminal_command_timeout_seconds.description: Timeout for each local terminal command

response_char_limit.description: Maximum number of response characters sent back to the chat

default_history_length.description: Default A2A task history length to request

request_timeout_seconds.description: HTTP timeout used for agent card discovery and JSON-RPC calls

poll_interval_seconds.description: Polling interval for non-terminal A2A tasks

max_wait_seconds.description: Maximum time to wait for a task before returning the latest status
